description: The main objective of this pipeline is to measure ROI statistics. The pipeline starts with a node that measures ROI and ends with another node that annotates data with table values, in between there are other nodes that measure ROI and annotate data.

284159c5-5ce1-4bfd-831b-ab31f2768a7c.name: annotate-data-with-table-values
284159c5-5ce1-4bfd-831b-ab31f2768a7c.description:
Annotates the incoming data with values from the input table

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.

061cd3b3-a125-4be5-b2f0-5f2320bafcef.name: ij3d-measure-roi3d
061cd3b3-a125-4be5-b2f0-5f2320bafcef.description:
Generates a results table containing 3D ROI statistics. If a reference image is provided, the statistics are calculated for the reference image. Otherwise, NaN is returned.

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.
